provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, old female reptilian alien with faded olive scales going pale at the jaw and crest from age, a prominent crest ridge bearing the worn marks of decades of status, amber eyes gone cloudy but still sharp with intelligence, a thick slow-moving tail, broad frame gone slightly soft with age but still imposing, wearing ceremonial dark bronze plate armor over layered dark red formal robes, the armor is ancestral and has been fitted to her frame, a house crest medallion hanging on a heavy chain, no weapons but the authority of someone who commands warriors
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
